keystrokes.description: Keystrokes to execute in the terminal. Use tmux-style escape sequences for modifier keys (e.g. C-c for ctrl-c). Modifier keys must be sent as their own commands otherwise the characters will be interpreted literally.
keystrokes.title: Keystrokes

is_blocking.description: Whether to wait for and return the terminal output after executing these keystrokes. This will append '; tmux wait -S done' to your command.DO NOT block on modifier keys or inside interactive programs (e.g. vim or less). Only block when the command is executed in the command line, is not interactive, and you expect the output to be returned with no intervention. When in doubt, wait instead of blocking.
is_blocking.title: Is Blocking

timeout_sec.description: The number of expected seconds to wait for the command to complete.
timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec

state_analysis.description: Description of the current state of the terminal
state_analysis.title: State Analysis

explanation.description: Brief explanation of what these commands will do
explanation.title: Explanation

commands.description: List of shell interactions to execute in the Docker container
commands.title: Commands

is_task_complete.description: Whether the task is complete following the execution of these commands. Make sure to check that the command you last executed worked before saying you're done.
is_task_complete.title: Is Task Complete

original_response: {"id": "chatcmpl-DSUKdQqMtBNXHBiwAqqx9G2pe5lix", "choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "logprobs": null, "message": {"content": "{\"state_analysis\":\"The terminal is open at the root directory of the Docker container, likely at the location where the UPET repository is cloned or needs to be cloned to.\",\"explanation\":\"The commands will clone the UPET repository, check out the specified commit, install necessary dependencies, and run the training script with the specified parameters.\",\"commands\":[{\"keystrokes\":\"git clone https://github.com/wjn1996/UPET.git\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":15},{\"keystrokes\":\"cd UPET\\n\",\"is_blocking\":false,\"timeout_sec\":5},{\"keystrokes\":\"git checkout 4701c3c62441077cc44a6553bf6ae909d99b8351\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":10},{\"keystrokes\":\"pip install -r requirements.txt\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":30},{\"keystrokes\":\"python run.py --model_name roberta-base --task_name rte --do_train --do_eval --max_seq_length 128 --per_device_train_batch_size 8 --learning_rate 2e-5 --num_train_epochs 1 --output_dir ./results --seed 42 --overwrite_output_dir --examples_per_label 5\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":120}],\"is_task_complete\":false}", "refusal": null, "role": "assistant", "annotations": [], "audio": null, "function_call": null, "tool_calls": null}}], "created": 1775682151, "model": "gpt-4o-2024-08-06", "object": "chat.completion", "service_tier": "default", "system_fingerprint": "fp_621b5a0858", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 276, "prompt_tokens": 1333, "total_tokens": 1609, "completion_tokens_details": {"accepted_prediction_tokens": 0, "audio_tokens": 0, "reasoning_tokens": 0, "rejected_prediction_tokens": 0}, "prompt_tokens_details": {"audio_tokens": 0, "cached_tokens": 0}}}
